teacher.rolloutNotes: Hard cutover from Qwen3.6-35B-A3B to Kimi K2.6 on 2026-05-02. Teacher is the multimodal wrapper (model_type=kimi_k25) whose text inner is DeepSeek V3 MoE (61 layers, 384 experts, 8 active, ~32B active / ~1T total). Students must match the Kimi tokenizer (BPE vocab 163,840) and use the text-only DeepseekV3ForCausalLM architecture with model_type=deepseek_v3 (transformers built-in, no custom code required). Student size cap is 33B total params (was 40B). 2026-05-04: removed model_type=kimi_k2 and KimiK25ForConditionalGeneration from the student allowlist — both require shipping custom modeling code which our trust_remote_code policy forbids; students kept getting silently DQ’d on the eval pod with "Transformers does not recognize this architecture". Teacher-side cross-tokenizer (Path A) is disabled because student and teacher now share the Kimi tokenizer.
